title: The Garden of Broken Compasses
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A retired cartographer in a drought-stricken valley begins drawing maps of a city that doesn't exist, but as the ink dries, the map's rivers appear in the dry creek beds and its streets overlay the dirt roads, pulling the entire town into a place that was never on any chart.
long_description: A retired cartographer in a drought-stricken valley begins drawing maps of a city that doesn't exist, but as the ink dries, the map's rivers appear in the dry creek beds and its streets overlay the dirt roads, pulling the entire town into a place that was never on any chart.
